package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for header_injection_via_user_input: `w.Header().Set(name, userInput)` or `w.Header().Add(name, userInput)` where the value contains unvalidated user input that could contain `\r\n`
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario717Positive(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	w.Header().Set("X-Display-Name", r.FormValue("name"))
}
